label: Microsoft Azure Security Engineer Associate (Exam AZ-500)
description: Hands-on study notes for Microsoft Azure Security Engineer Associate (Exam AZ-500) focused on practical Azure security deployment, not theory. Follow step-by-step labs to configure Microsoft Defender for Cloud, build custom Azure Policies, implement Entra ID Conditional Access, secure VNet peering with Azure Firewall, and use exact Azure CLI/PowerShell commands for RBAC, key rotation, and incident response.
